PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?band ?bandLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q15224805 wdt:P710 ?band .
  ?band wdt:P31 wd:Q2088355 .
  ?band wdt:P264 wd:Q21178769 .
  ?band wdt:P264 ?label .
  ?label rdfs:label ?labelName .
  FILTER(LANG(?labelName) = 'en')

  ?genre rdfs:label ?genreLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?genreLabel) , 'indie'))
  ?band rdfs:label ?bandLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?bandLabel) = 'en')
  BIND('The Checks' AS ?manualAnswer)
}
LIMIT 1
